templates.name: Can I ship my order to a Rainbow store for pick up?
templates.content: We provide everyday free shipping for all orders sent to a Rainbow Store for pickup. No order minimum or promo code is required. Please note that orders shipped to a Rainbow Store are not eligible for expedited one or two-day delivery.

templates.name: What payment types do you accept?
templates.content: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Shop Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna, Afterpay, Cash App and Rainbow Shops Gift Cards.

templates.name: Can I return an online purchase in store?
templates.content:
We gladly accept returns to any of our 1,000+ Rainbow Stores. Please visit our store locator to find the Rainbow store nearest you: https://stores.rainbowshops.com/ Simply bring the merchandise you wish to return and the packing slip from your order when you visit the store. Please make sure that all original tags are attached to the merchandise. If you do not have all original tags and the packing slip for your order the store will be unable to process your return.

Please note that purchases made using PayPal or Klarna can only be refunded via merchandise credit when returned to a Rainbow Store. I'm afraid we cannot process refunds to your PayPal or Klarna account from our stores.

templates.name: Does you ship to military addresses?
templates.content: We offer standard shipping to APO/FPO addresses. Unfortunately, at this time we do not offer express shipping to APO/FPO.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy for online purchases here: https://www.rainbowshops.com/pages/return-policy

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-844-572-4626, Monday-Friday 10am - 8pm ET, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Please note that we process orders as quickly as possible and there is a 15 minute window for order cancellations. Please call Customer Service at 844-572-4626 immediately to see if there is a possibility to cancel or edit your order.

templates.name: Does you offer gift receipts?
templates.content: We do not offer gift receipts.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: I'm afraid we do not ship internationally at the moment.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! Our clothes generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size?

templates.name: Can I exchange an item?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we are unable to perform online exchanges. If you need to exchange any or all of your purchased items, please first check availability on our site. If the preferred item is available, please place a new order and follow the return instructions at the following link to send back your original order: https://www.rainbowshops.com/pages/return-policy

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.rainbowshops.com/pages/r-sale

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our Affiliate Program here: https://signup.cj.com/member/signup/publisher/?cid=4615270#/branded?_k=fzjcrj

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customerservice@rainbowshops.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@rainbowshops.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/rainbowshops/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/RainbowApparel

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us near you here: https://stores.rainbowshops.com/

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all orders over $75 within the continental US and free shipping to Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico, and US Virgin Islands on orders over $99. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via FedEx and once shipped it will take 3-7 business days for domestic orders. For additional shipping information visit: https://www.rainbowshops.com/pages/shipping-information
